body:
Hey Amara, hope you're doing well — it's been a minute since we caught up properly. I wanted to loop you in on something I've been quietly tracking over the past few weeks: a seed-stage team out of Montreal building grid-edge optimization software that I think sits squarely in your climate infrastructure thesis at [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital). They're pre-Series A, have a handful of utility pilots already running in Quebec, and the technical co-founder previously led power systems work at a major ISO — genuinely impressive pedigree. I'm not leading this one given some portfolio overlap on our end at [Threshold Ventures](orgs/threshold-ventures), but I thought of you immediately and didn't want to just let the intro window close. Let me know if you'd like me to make the connection — happy to set up a three-way call if the timing works.

— Mina
